title: WordPress Fingerprint Detected
description: A WordPress fingerprint was detected. Exposed CMS technology can aid targeted exploitation if patching lags.
impact: Attackers can quickly align known vulnerabilities and plugin exploit paths with exposed platforms.
likelihood: Medium for publicly exposed CMS instances.
recommendations: Keep WordPress core, plugins, and themes fully patched.
Reduce version disclosure where operationally feasible.
Implement WAF and authentication hardening for admin paths.
